economic_notes: Nation has two government business enterprises: Red Pheasant Cree Nation Developments GP Corporation and Red Pheasant Centex Operations GP Corp. First Nation Gaming Trust revenue of $1,233,200 received. Economic dependence on ISC funding noted.
notes: ISC recovery of $75,852 netted against revenue. Large increase in accounts payable from $1,615,431 to $6,768,170 warrants attention. Significant increase in tangible capital assets ($10.5M additions) and long-term debt repayment of ~$5M. Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis with combined investment value of $1,993,275. First Nation Programs segment shows unusual other revenue of $9,648,150 in 2024 vs $1,705,693 in 2023, driving large surplus increase. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($23,231,175) and CMHC ($202,904) = $10,824,504. No schedule of remuneration provided.
